title: woodsia indusiosa
intro: Woodsia indusiosa, also known as Indian Woodsia, is a type of fern species native to the Himalayan region. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with roots and rhizomes containing compounds like flavonoids and alkaloids, which have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Woodsia indusiosa include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in traditional medicine to aid digestion and relieve menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Woodsia indusiosa can be made by boiling the roots and rhizomes in water or by using them in infusions, decoctions, or as a powder for various health benefits.
